configurePresets.name: _base
configurePresets.description: Shared base: Ninja generator, vcpkg toolchain, exported compile_commands.json, and a single vcpkg install tree at build/_vcpkg_installed shared across every preset that inherits this one. Sharing is safe only while every inheriting preset uses the same triplet (arm64-osx today) with no ABI-affecting flags. Debug, release, and tidy share the tree. The asan preset (S1-02) opted out: libc++'s std::vector container annotations get out of sync when an uninstrumented dependency mutates a vector through the same allocator (Exiv2::XmpData::add hit this), so asan now uses arm64-osx-asan with its own _vcpkg_installed_asan tree. A future tsan preset (S1-03) will follow the same pattern.

configurePresets.name: debug
configurePresets.description: Debug build: -g, no optimization. Day-to-day development.

configurePresets.name: release
configurePresets.description: Release build: -O3 -DNDEBUG. Shipping and performance benchmarks.

configurePresets.name: tidy
configurePresets.description: Debug build that runs clang-tidy on every compilation unit (NFR-8 static-analysis gate). Check set and suppressions configured in S0-06.

configurePresets.name: asan
configurePresets.description: Debug build with ASan + UBSan. Wired into CI by S1-02. `-fno-sanitize-recover=undefined` turns every UBSan finding into an abort so the CI step fails; ASan already aborts by default. Uses its own _vcpkg_installed_asan tree built via the arm64-osx-asan custom triplet so dependency code is instrumented too — required to keep libc++'s container annotations consistent across third-party calls into our vectors (see cmake/triplets/arm64-osx-asan.cmake). The first cold build under this preset rebuilds the entire vcpkg closure with sanitizer flags; subsequent runs hit the GHA cache.
